Class DRCrosstabGroup<T>

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.crosstab.DRCrosstabGroup<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRICrosstabGroup<T>, DRIExpression<T>, DRISystemExpression<T>, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
DRCrosstabColumnGroup, DRCrosstabRowGroup
public abstract class DRCrosstabGroup<T> extends Object implements DRICrosstabGroup<T>

Abstract DRCrosstabGroup class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca, Jan Moxter
See Also:
